svg.text: Local-first, cloud-optional — graded by how far it's actually proven
The same Docker image and process_vod() run on a laptop or on ephemeral Azure. Each tier is placed by the evidence that backs it, not by ambition.
green on every push — ruff · mypy · pytest · bandit · pip-audit

g.text: FastAPI service — same process_vod(), 24 API tests
Next.js dashboard — SSE, approve/reject, Cypress specs
PyPI clipsmith-ai v0.2.1 · Docker image published

svg.text: real modules + Terraform, but no recorded CI run — proven by hand, not by pipeline

g.text: → clipsmith cloud run — provisioner + azure_runner, Key Vault, Drive upload, teardown
→ Docker image last pulled 2026-06-05 (used) · e2e-cloud workflow exists but has 0 recorded runs
→ continuous deployment (deploy.yml, ACI update, health-check gate) — uncommitted in the working tree
the case study does not claim CD; it's named here as the current edge, not a finished feature

svg.text: Tier placement is auditable: registry checks, test counts, and workflow run history — not self-assessment.
